title: [ImportVerilog] Fix the types mismatch for variable declarations.

features.name: bit type variable with 1-bit literal initializer
features.description: Code should include a variable declaration with the 'bit' type and a 1-bit literal initializer (e.g., bit b = 1'b1;)

features.name: slice assignment to narrower logic variable
features.description: Code should include a variable declaration where a slice of a wider signal is assigned to a narrower logic variable with an initial value
